revision.comment: new key for [[Category:21st century in religion]]: "*" using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
revision.text:
{{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:21st century in religion|*]] [[Category:Buildings and structures completed in the 21st century| Religious buildings]] [[Category:Religious buildings and structures by century|21]] [[Category:3rd-millennium religious buildings and structures]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
revision.text:
{{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:21st century in religion|*]] [[Category:Buildings and structures completed in the 21st century| Religious buildings]] [[Category:Religious buildings and structures by century|21]] [[Category:3rd-millennium religious buildings and structures]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: remove obsolete category Category fixed
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Refreshing redirects
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8207039)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=21st-century_religious_buildings_and_structures here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. {{Navseasoncats}} {{wikidata link|Q8207039|en|Category:21st-century religious buildings and structures}}
